info.name: MartPilot SaaS API
info.description: Complete REST API collection for MartPilot multi-tenant marketplace platform

request.description: Create a new tenant (SaaS account). Returns the created tenant with ID.
Retrieve all tenants in the system.

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
[
  {
    "id": 1,
    "business_name": "Best Mart Electronics",
    "subdomain": "bestmart",
    "custom_domain": "bestmart.com",
    "owner_name": "John Doe",
    "phone": "+1234567890",
    "email": "john@bestmart.com",
    "subscription_plan": "premium",
    "is_active": true,
    "created_at": "2024-03-30T10:30:00"
  },
  {
    "id": 2,
    "business_name": "Tech Store",
    "subdomain": "techstore",
    "custom_domain": "techstore.io",
    "owner_name": "Jane Smith",
    "phone": "+0987654321",
    "email": "jane@techstore.io",
    "subscription_plan": "standard",
    "is_active": true,
    "created_at": "2024-03-29T15:45:00"
  }
]

request.description: Retrieve only active tenants (is_active = true).
Get a specific tenant by ID. Use variable {{tenant_id}} for the ID.
Get tenant by subdomain (useful for multi-tenant routing).
Update tenant details. Only provided fields are updated (partial update).
Delete a tenant and all associated data (cascade delete). Requires confirmation.

item.name: 👤 Users
item.description: Manage platform users across all tenants

request.description: Create a new user. Phone number must be unique.
Retrieve all users in the system.
Get a specific user by ID.
Get user by phone number (useful for login).
Update user details.
Delete a user. All associated tenant mappings and orders will be deleted.

item.name: 🔗 User-Tenants (Mappings)
item.description: Manage user assignments to tenants (many-to-many relationship)

request.description: Assign a user to a tenant. User can be assigned to multiple tenants.
Get all tenants assigned to a user.
Get all users assigned to a tenant.
Check if a user is assigned to a specific tenant.
Remove user's access to a specific tenant.
Create a new store for the tenant. Includes location coordinates for geolocation.

response.name: 201 Created
response.body:
{
  "id": 1,
  "tenant_id": 1,
  "name": "Best Mart - Downtown",
  "address": "123 Main Street, New York, NY 10001",
  "latitude": 40.7128,
  "longitude": -74.0060,
  "is_active": true
}

request.description: Get all stores for a tenant.

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
[
  {
    "id": 1,
    "tenant_id": 1,
    "name": "Best Mart - Downtown",
    "address": "123 Main Street, New York, NY 10001",
    "latitude": 40.7128,
    "longitude": -74.0060,
    "is_active": true
  },
  {
    "id": 2,
    "tenant_id": 1,
    "name": "Best Mart - Midtown",
    "address": "456 Broadway, New York, NY 10013",
    "latitude": 40.7580,
    "longitude": -73.9855,
    "is_active": true
  }
]

request.description: Get only active stores for a tenant.
Get a specific store by ID.

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
{
  "id": 1,
  "tenant_id": 1,
  "name": "Best Mart - Downtown",
  "address": "123 Main Street, New York, NY 10001",
  "latitude": 40.7128,
  "longitude": -74.0060,
  "is_active": true
}

request.description: Update store details.
Delete a store. All associated products and orders will be deleted.

item.name: 📁 Categories (Tenant-Scoped)
item.description: Manage product categories with hierarchical structure

request.description: Create a root category (parent_id = null).
Create a subcategory under a parent category (parent_id = parent category ID).
Get all categories for a tenant.
Get only root-level categories (parent_id = null).
Get all subcategories under a parent category.
Get a specific category by ID.
Update category details.
Delete a category. Subcategories and products in this category will be deleted.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Dell XPS 13 Laptop",
  "description": "Ultra-portable 13-inch FHD touchscreen laptop with Intel Core i7, 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD",
  "category_id": 2,
  "image_url": "https://example.com/products/dell-xps-13.jpg",
  "brand": "Dell"
}

request.description: Create a new product in the tenant's catalog.
Get all products in a tenant's catalog.
Get all products in a specific category.
Get a specific product by ID.
Update product details.

response.name: 200 OK
response.body:
{
  "id": 1,
  "tenant_id": 1,
  "name": "Dell XPS 13 Laptop - 2024 Edition",
  "description": "New 2024 model with Intel Core i9...",
  "brand": "Dell"
}

request.description: Delete a product. All store inventories and order items for this product will be deleted.
Add a product to a store with specific pricing and stock. Each store can have different prices for the same product.
Get all products available in a specific store.
Get all stores that carry a specific product and their pricing.
Get a specific store-product entry (inventory record).
Update pricing, stock, or availability for a product in a store.
Remove a product from a store's inventory.
Create a new order. Add items to the order using Order Items endpoint.
Get all orders for a tenant.
Get all orders placed by a specific user.
Get all orders placed at a specific store.
Get a specific order by ID.
Update order status (pending, completed, cancelled, etc.) and payment status.
Delete an order. All order items will be deleted.
Add a product to an order with quantity and price.
Get all items in a specific order.
Get a specific order item by ID.
Update quantity or price of an order item.
Remove an item from an order.
